content:
💡 bytechef | Java
🎯 Primary Use Case: Unifying AI agent orchestration and workflow automation for enterprise applications, enabling complex AI-driven processes and integrations.
✨ Key Features: • AI Agent Orchestration • Workflow Automation • Drag-and-drop AI Agent component • Streaming and structured output for agents • Support for 14 LLM providers
📖 Summary: ByteChef is an open-source platform that unifies AI agent orchestration and workflow automation. It allows for the creation and management of complex AI agents with integrated tools, memory, and guardrails, alongside a visual workflow editor for automating tasks. This platform is designed for enterprises, offering self-hosted deployment and embeddability into other products.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
